message:
fix(dep,output,schema): graceful missing-issue handling, lazy TOON stats, and safer schema rebuild

- dep.rs: resolve_dep_tree_node_metadata now returns a placeholder
  for missing/deleted issues instead of failing the entire tree render,
  preventing crashes when dependency graphs reference pruned issues
- context.rs: extract should_emit_toon_stats() const fn to avoid
  computing JSON pretty-print length when stats are disabled; add
  3 unit tests for the flag/env matrix
- schema.rs: disable foreign keys during issues table rebuild to
  prevent constraint violations from cross-table references during
  the DROP+RENAME cycle; quote table name in PRAGMA table_info;
  add kv_table_uses_primary_key check to runtime_schema_compatible;
  expand test fixtures with full column sets for comments and events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
